evals.name: chinese-faculty-homepage
evals.prompt: 帮我解析一下这位老师的主页，我要抽取结构化信息，最好是 JSON 格式：https://jiankang.usst.edu.cn/2021/0611/c13509a248959/page.htm
evals.expected_output: A JSON object wrapped as {status: 200, data: {...}} using the new API field names. At minimum: surname='杨建涛', organization='上海理工大学', department contains '健康科学与工程学院', professional maps to the 副教授 dictionary id, phone='021-55270127', email='jty@usst.edu.cn', country maps to 中国's id, avatar is a non-null URL, and direction contains biomechanics/robotics/wearable-sensor related topics. sex should be 0 when not inferable; birthday may be null.

evals.name: middle-eastern-faculty-homepage
evals.prompt: Extract the profile info from this faculty page into JSON: https://www.zu.ac.ae/main/en/colleges/colleges/__college_of_technological_innovation/faculty_and_staff/_auh/_computing-and-applied-technology/_profiles/monther_aldwairi
evals.expected_output: A JSON object wrapped as {status: 200, data: {...}} using the new API field names. At minimum: surname contains 'Monther Aldwairi', organization='Zayed University', department contains 'College of Technological Innovation', professional maps to 教授, phone='+971 2 599 3238', country maps to 阿联酋's id, avatar is a non-null URL, and domain/direction reflects security or AI related topics. email may be null because the page uses a contact form.

evals.name: partial-field-request
evals.prompt: 从 https://jiankang.usst.edu.cn/2021/0611/c13509a248959/page.htm 这个页面里，只告诉我这位老师的邮箱、研究方向和头像链接就行。
evals.expected_output: The result should clearly expose email='jty@usst.edu.cn', direction containing biomechanics/rehab-robotics topics, and avatar pointing to a real image URL under jiankang.usst.edu.cn. Returning the full new API shape is acceptable.
